subtitle.en: Plusiotis (Chrysina) beetles reflect left-circularly-polarised metallic gold/green via a cholesteric chitin helicoid — pitch matches half-wavelength, handedness encodes which polarisation reflects
subtitle.ko: Plusiotis 딱정벌레의 chitin 헬리코이드 — 왼쪽 원편광만 반사, pitch가 색을 결정

description.en: Bouligand helicoid schematic + beetle silhouette filled by Bragg-pitch colour. Slider tunes pitch from blue to red metallic appearance.
description.ko: Bouligand schematic + 딱정벌레 실루엣. 슬라이더로 pitch 조정 청→적 금속색.
